title: lathyrus lanszwertii var. laetivirens
intro: Lathyrus lanszwertii var. laetivirens, also known as the purple pea or Western sweet pea, is a flowering plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to the western coast of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Lathyrus lanszwertii var. laetivirens include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties, making it a valuable herb for overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by drying the flowers and leaves, and can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
